def suitable_for_painting(self) -> bool:
        age_condition = 18 <= self.age <= 65
        employment_condition = self.employment_status in ["employed", "student"]
        education_condition = self.education in ["college", "bachelor", "master", "doctor"]
        race_condition = self.race in ["asian", "white", "black", "hispanic", "indian"]
        gender_condition = self.gender in ["transgender", "non-binary", "male", "female", "gender neutral"]
        return age_condition and employment_condition and education_condition and (race_condition or gender_condition)
